basic_details.job_title: CAMPA AN Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Forestry Expert / Accountant Expert Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Compensatory Afforestation Fund Management and Planning Authority Andaman & Nicobar (CAMPA AN)
basic_details.short_information: Compensatory Afforestation Fund Management and Planning Authority Andaman & Nicobar (CAMPA AN) Forestry Expert / Accountant Expert Notification 2026 has been released under Advertisement No. APCCF/State CAMPA/45/Vol-I (2026-27) on the official website of CAMPA AN. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the CAMPA AN Forestry Expert / Accountant Expert Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor Degree in Forestry/Environmental Science or equivalent; Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce (B.Com) / Finance / Accounting
qualification.details: Forestry Expert: Bachelor Degree in Forestry/Environmental Science or equivalent from a recognized University. Preference will be given to candidates having experience in forestry works, plantation, or forest management. Working knowledge of MS Office, GIS etc. Accountant Expert: Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce (B.Com) / Finance / Accounting from a recognized university. Working knowledge of accounting software, MS Excel, and financial reporting. Experience in government accounting / CAMPA / project accounting preferred.

salary_details.details: ₹40,000 per month (consolidated) for both Forestry Expert and Accountant Expert posts.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for CAMPA AN Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://forest.and.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for CAMPA AN Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the CAMPA AN Recruitment 2026 is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Forestry Expert and Accountant Expert posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced by CAMPA AN for the year 2026, with one post for Forestry Expert and one for Accountant Expert.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Forestry Expert post?
faq.answer: For the Forestry Expert position, candidates must hold a Bachelor Degree in Forestry/Environmental Science or an equivalent qualification from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Accountant Expert post?
faq.answer: The Accountant Expert role requires a Bachelor’s Degree in Commerce (B.Com) / Finance / Accounting from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the posts advertised by CAMPA AN?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the advertised posts is 65 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for these contractual positions?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for both Forestry Expert and Accountant Expert positions will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for CAMPA AN Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the CAMPA AN Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a weightage-based evaluation system totaling 100 marks, followed by an interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. In which mode should the application be submitted?
faq.answer: Applications for the CAMPA AN Recruitment 2026 must be submitted through the offline mode, which involves sending a filled application form by post.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Compensatory Afforestation Fund Management and Planning Authority Andaman & Nicobar, which is https://forest.and.nic.in.
